sources.title: Tin Man | Part 3 of 3 | "Tin Man" | 2007 | Adventure Miniseries, Neal McDonough, Wizard of Oz
sources.description:
The courage, brains and heart of DG and her companions are all that separate the O.Z. from permanent darkness as the double-eclipse of its twin suns draws near.

This $20M Sci-Fi Channel  epic mini-series dramatically reimagined L. Frank Baum's The Wonderful Wizard of Oz stories, achieving record ratings for its premiere and earning 9 Emmy nominations.

Zooey Deschanel
Neal McDonough
Alan Cumming
Raoul Trujillo
Kathleen Robertson
Anna Galvin
Doug Abrahams
Blu Mankuma
Richard Dreyfuss

2007
Directed by Nick Willing

Fantasy
Adventure
Family

#wizardofoz

sources.title: Tin Man | Part 2 of 3 | "Search for the Emerald" | 2007 | Fantasy, Wizard of Oz, Zooey Deschanel
sources.description:
DG travels the old brick road in pursuit of the Emerald of the Eclipse, the key to determining whether good or evil will rule the O.Z.

This $20M Sci-Fi Channel  epic mini-series dramatically reimagined L. Frank Baum's The Wonderful Wizard of Oz stories, achieving record ratings for its premiere and earning 9 Emmy nominations.

Watch Episode 3 HERE: https://youtu.be/waknyKg2zwA

Zooey Deschanel
Neal McDonough
Alan Cumming
Raoul Trujillo
Kathleen Robertson

metadata.Plot: An inspirational film about a young farmer who, after the loss of his little girl, overcomes his inability to communicate and express himself to those he loves.
metadata.Actors: Evan Juliette, Mitchell McGhee, Louis Ratliff, Susie Spear Purcell
